steps.title: Find Rivera's distinct method
steps.content: The passage says Rivera performed classic songs much more slowly than other ranchera singers did. It also explains why: the slower tempo let her express the emotional quality of the lyrics more fully.

steps.title: Reject contradicted details
steps.content:
• Choice A describes most other ranchera singers, not Rivera, whose voice was raspy.
  • Choice B is false because Rivera performed songs written from a male point of view.
  • Choice C is unsupported; the passage says she performed classic songs, not that she disliked them.
The answer is D.
